name: Mist Fade
description: Fog dissipating to reveal quiet clarity

prompts.label: gentle fog layer dissipating to reveal quiet clarity
prompts.text: gentle fog layer dissipating to reveal quiet clarity, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: mist texture thinning to transparent whisper
prompts.text: mist texture thinning to transparent whisper, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: atmospheric haze clearing with soft warm lift
prompts.text: atmospheric haze clearing with soft warm lift, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: morning vapor burning off with golden warmth
prompts.text: morning vapor burning off with golden warmth, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: cloud bank retreating to expose still silence
prompts.text: cloud bank retreating to expose still silence, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
